subcodes.first_line: O esteemed Bahjat, may God strengthen thee! Thou hast indeed borne hardship, and thine eyes have witnessed what was achieved only through intense struggle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حضره بهجت ایدک الله لقد تحملت المشقه لم تکونوا بالعینه الا بشق الانفس ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
